mock)"}}},"title":"ClaimMinter \u2014 WayMint provenance certificate minter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"mintSelfLinkedCert(string,string)":{"notice":"Mint a SelfLinked certificate.         Requires the caller to be registered in Self Protocol's SelfAgentRegistry         (proof can be expired \u2014 just needs registration)."},"mintSelfVerifiedCert(string,string)":{"notice":"Mint a SelfVerified certificate \u2014 the highest trust tier.         Requires a current, non-expired ZK proof in Self Protocol.         This is the load-bearing Self Protocol integration:         isVerifiedAgent() must return true on the live SelfAgentRegistry."},"mintWalletCert(string,string)":{"notice":"Mint a WalletOnly certificate.         agentKey is derived from the caller's address."},"walletAgentKey(address)":{"notice":"Compute the agentKey for a wallet address (EVM agent mode)"}},"notice":"Issues on-chain provenance certificates for AI agents.         Certificates bind an agent identifier to a human owner at three trust levels:           0. WalletOnly  \u2014 wallet address only, no identity verification           1. SelfLinked  \u2014 agent is registered in Self Protocol's SelfAgentRegistry                            (passport/ID backed, ZK proof on Celo)           2. SelfVerified \u2014 registered AND currently has a valid non-expired proof         Self Protocol integration is load-bearing:           - SelfLinked requires getAgentId(agentKey) > 0           - SelfVerified requires isVerifiedAgent(agentKey) == true           Both check the live SelfAgentRegistry contract on Celo.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ClaimMinter.sol":"ClaimMinter"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ClaimMinter.sol":{"keccak256":"0xefd6cf53eefa9cb9cc2051c1f74df2216ad969f95f7ab14725f065887cfd4b64","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f75ec8f32f5aa0cf3919ce5fe1dd41500b1f64bc88526d0923ba44568dd8d769","dweb:/ipfs/QmR4uaHR15n8WTZZweBDwRhYbLHbfwyYemX7gwrUp4Xwhd"]},"src/ISelfAgentRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x57609c7ac195b107450b972d993c2056b75bfa41ae574f42f0aa7860b740ac43","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://876682160fca12353a842d718e026a78b75bd6a9431df16321e223b984fae629","dweb:/ipfs/QmTzepoNkRsgmNp9JeRMHa7wdWhnHyy1Er1yR9UBekn5dA"]}},"version":1}

params._selfRegistry: Address of ISelfAgentRegistry (or address(0) for mock)

mintSelfLinkedCert(string,string).notice: Mint a SelfLinked certificate.         Requires the caller to be registered in Self Protocol's SelfAgentRegistry         (proof can be expired — just needs registration).

mintSelfVerifiedCert(string,string).notice: Mint a SelfVerified certificate — the highest trust tier.         Requires a current, non-expired ZK proof in Self Protocol.         This is the load-bearing Self Protocol integration:         isVerifiedAgent() must return true on the live SelfAgentRegistry.

mintWalletCert(string,string).notice: Mint a WalletOnly certificate.         agentKey is derived from the caller's address.

walletAgentKey(address).notice: Compute the agentKey for a wallet address (EVM agent mode)
